title: Niedenzuella warmingiana
taxonomy: Niedenzuella warmingiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "melastome family" or "memecylid". It belongs to the genus Niedenzuella. The classification of Niedenzuella warmingiana is further categorized as belonging to the order Myrtales. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships. It is native to a specific region in South America.
